---
title: "Çalışma 2"
---

\
my_first <- "Emre"
my_birth_year <- 1987

data("polls_us_election_2016")
data <- polls_us_election_2016

k <- (nchar(my_first) + my_birth_year) %% 15 + 8
k

if (k %% 2 == 0) {
  head(data, k)
} else {
  tail(data, k)
}

sum(is.na(data))

na_per_column <- colSums(is.na(data))
na_per_column <- sort(na_per_column, decreasing = TRUE)

head(na_per_column, 8)

new_data <- data

for(col in names(new_data)){

  if(is.numeric(new_data[[col]])){
    
    new_data[[col]][is.na(new_data[[col]])] <- my_birth_year + k
    
  } else if(is.character(new_data[[col]]) | is.factor(new_data[[col]])){
    
    new_data[[col]][is.na(new_data[[col]])] <- paste0(my_first, "_", k)
    
  }

}

if (k %% 2 == 0) {
  head(new_data, k)
} else {
  tail(new_data, k)
}

sum(is.na(new_data))

anyNA(new_data)


## (a)

```{r}
1 + 1
```

## (b)
